title: Korak 3

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents: List of Major Web Browsers
challengeFiles.seed: List of Major Web Browsers

tests.text: You should have a dt element inside of your dl element.
Your dt element should have the text Google Chrome.
You should have a dd element below your dt element.
Your dd element should contain the text This is a free web browser developed by Google and first released in 2008.
tests.testString:
const ddElement = document.querySelector('dd');
assert.strictEqual(ddElement?.textContent.trim(), "This is a free web browser developed by Google and first released in 2008.");

description:
Liste opisa sastavljene su od liste pojmova i detalja. Element dt predstavlja opisni pojam, dok element dd predstavlja detalj opisa.

Prvi pretraživač koji ćete dodati u svoju listu opisa biće za Google Chrome.

Unutar vašeg elementa dl, dodajte element dt koji sadrži tekst Google Chrome.

Ispod vašeg elementa dt, dodajte element dd sa sledećim tekstom:

This is a free web browser developed by Google and first released in 2008.
